description_long: This object is a classic incandescent light bulb with a transparent glass envelope and a metallic screw base. The bulb features a visible tungsten filament supported by two thin metal wires, which are anchored to the base. The glass envelope is smooth and clear, allowing an unobstructed view of the internal filament structure. The metallic base is ribbed for grip and designed to screw into a standard socket. The overall form is rounded at the top and tapers smoothly into the base, typical of general-purpose household bulbs. There are no decorative elements or additional features beyond the functional components.
description: A clear glass incandescent light bulb with a metallic screw base and visible filament. The design is simple, functional, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rounded glass envelope, filament, and ribbed metallic base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bulb and the alignment of the filament wires.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with the filament and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and internal filament structure.
